title: Biltine Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Biltine with a Z-Score of +3.74. This critical event has a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Biltine is causing extremely high temperatures, with a CDD of 12.1 GG. 
 The low humidity of 15% and moderate wind speed of 22.1 km/h are exacerbating the heat. 
 The HDD is 0.0 GG, indicating no heating demand, while the high CDD value shows a significant cooling demand.
conclusion: Implement emergency measures to mitigate the heat wave's effects immediately.
